$description: BIM climate zone tokens — anchored to ASHRAE 90.1-2022 climate zone taxonomy (Zones 0-8, subtypes A/B/C). U-values listed are high-performance targets (Passivhaus / NZEB level); ASHRAE 90.1 minimum thresholds are less restrictive. Cite ASHRAE 90.1 Tables 5.5-0 through 5.5-8 for code-minimum U-values per zone.

very_cold_arctic.$description: ASHRAE 90.1 Climate Zones 7 (Very Cold) and 8 (Subarctic/Arctic). HDD18 > 5400°C-days. Dominant in northern Canada, Alaska, Scandinavia, Siberia.

max_u_value_external_wall.$description: High-performance target U-value for external walls (W/m²K). Passivhaus / NZEB level — more stringent than ASHRAE 90.1 minimum. ASHRAE 90.1 Zone 7/8 mass-wall minimum: ~0.205 W/m²K (U-0.036 BTU/hr·ft²·°F). Cite ASHRAE 90.1-2022 Table 5.5-7/8 for code-compliance thresholds.

bsdd_ref.$description: Uniclass 2015 Pr_25_57_06_56 — Mineral wool insulation products (NBS bSDD dictionary). Verify classification code against current bSDD at identifier.buildingsmart.org.

mixed_cool_temperate.$description: ASHRAE 90.1 Climate Zones 3 (Mixed), 4 (Mixed), and 5 (Cool). Covers most of continental Europe, UK, Pacific Northwest, and upper Midwest USA.

max_u_value_external_wall.$description: High-performance target U-value for external walls (W/m²K). Passivhaus / NZEB level — more stringent than ASHRAE 90.1 minimum. ASHRAE 90.1 Zone 3-5 mass-wall minimums range ~0.227–0.490 W/m²K depending on zone and construction type. Cite ASHRAE 90.1-2022 Tables 5.5-3 through 5.5-5 for code-compliance thresholds.

bsdd_ref.$description: Uniclass 2015 Pr_25_57_06_56 — Mineral wool insulation products (NBS bSDD dictionary). Verify classification code against current bSDD at identifier.buildingsmart.org.
